falsification_conditions.condition: The blowoff score exceeds 50 within 14 days
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: A blowoff score above 50 indicates extreme volatility/momentum, contradicting the 'HOLD' signal and suggesting a potential reversal or breakdown

falsification_conditions.condition: The S&P 500 breaks above 5,500 with volume > 3.5 billion shares on at least 3 consecutive days
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: A sustained breakout above this key resistance level with heavy volume would invalidate the pattern similarity to a bearish bottom scenario

falsification_conditions.condition: The 20-day moving average of the VIX crosses below 12 and stays there for 5 consecutive days
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: This would indicate a significant decrease in market volatility, directly contradicting the 'HOLD' signal's implied uncertainty and blowoff risk

doctrine: If you can't list what would prove your call wrong, you don't have a real call.
